entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br. being studied for the establishment of a core collection.

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of the world collection of pearl millet germplasm designed to maximize diversity.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The range of genetic variability within the pearl millet world collection and core collection.

entities.name: MORPHO-AGRONOMIC CHARACTERS
entities.description: Physical and agricultural traits used to assess genetic diversity.

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Tools used to explain genetic variability and measure allelic frequencies.

entities.name: ALLELIC FREQUENCIES
entities.description: Measurements taken using molecular markers to assess genetic diversity.

entities.name: MULTIVARIATE CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: A classification approach used to determine the core collection that maximizes diversity.

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: A classification approach used to determine the core collection that maximizes diversity.

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Physical characteristics used to determine the extent of diversity within and between accessions.
